verification_notice: Universal coverage-verification scaffold. This is not a payer determination. Use it to ask the member's plan/PBM and prepare Epic evidence if PA or step therapy is required.

plan_verification_call.label: Plan/PBM verification completed
plan_verification_call.target_value: Drug, indication, PA status, step therapy, preferred alternatives, exact criteria, and call reference number documented
plan_verification_call.value_prompt: Plan/PBM, date, representative, reference number, and answer

type_2_diabetes.label: Type 2 diabetes diagnosis
type_2_diabetes.target_value: T2DM documented if plan says diabetes indication is required

a1c_evidence.label: HbA1c / glycemic evidence
a1c_evidence.target_value: Most recent HbA1c; common thresholds are plan-specific, often diabetes range or ≥7.0 if uncontrolled criterion is required

metformin_or_preferred_trial.label: Metformin/preferred-agent trial, contraindication, or intolerance
metformin_or_preferred_trial.target_value: Required only if plan/PBM reports step therapy
metformin_or_preferred_trial.value_prompt: Medication, dates, dose, response, intolerance, contraindication, or reason not appropriate

bmi_ge_30_or_27_comorbidity.label: BMI threshold for weight-related coverage
bmi_ge_30_or_27_comorbidity.target_value: Typical label/policy universe: BMI ≥30, or BMI ≥27 with weight-related comorbidity; exact plan rule must be verified
bmi_ge_30_or_27_comorbidity.value_prompt: BMI, height, weight, date, and comorbidity if BMI 27-29.9

lifestyle_weight_management.label: Lifestyle / weight-management documentation
lifestyle_weight_management.target_value: Diet, exercise, reduced-calorie plan, or structured weight-management program if plan requires it

anti_obesity_trial.label: Prior anti-obesity medication trial/intolerance/contraindication
anti_obesity_trial.target_value: Required only if plan/PBM reports step therapy
anti_obesity_trial.value_prompt: Medication, dates, response, intolerance, or contraindication

osa_with_ahi.label: OSA severity / sleep-study evidence
osa_with_ahi.target_value: Moderate-to-severe OSA or AHI/REI threshold if plan requires; document sleep study date/source
osa_with_ahi.value_prompt: AHI/REI, severity, study type/date, and sleep medicine note

pap_cpapt_status.label: PAP/CPAP status if required
pap_cpapt_status.target_value: Use, adherence, intolerance, unable/unwilling, or not required by plan
pap_cpapt_status.value_prompt: CPAP/PAP use, adherence data, intolerance, or reason not used

ascvd_evidence.label: Established cardiovascular disease / ASCVD
ascvd_evidence.target_value: Established CVD if plan covers a CV-risk-reduction pathway

ckd_albuminuria_t2d.label: CKD / albuminuria with type 2 diabetes if plan recognizes it
ckd_albuminuria_t2d.target_value: CKD, eGFR, UACR/albuminuria, and T2DM evidence if plan requires

mash_fibrosis_evidence.label: MASH/NASH/fatty liver fibrosis evidence if plan recognizes it
mash_fibrosis_evidence.target_value: MASH/NASH/MASLD plus fibrosis stage, often F2-F3/noncirrhotic when specified; exact plan rule must be verified
mash_fibrosis_evidence.value_prompt: Diagnosis, biopsy/FibroScan/MRE/FIB-4, fibrosis stage, hepatology note

policies.policy_name: Ask My Plan — GLP-1/GIP-GLP verification and Epic evidence prep
policies.source_name: Plan/PBM phone or portal verification required
policies.notes_on_limits: This row intentionally does not claim coverage. It creates a script and evidence checklist for member-specific verification.

agents.notes: Coverage is plan/member-specific; verify with PBM/plan.

pathways.target_values_summary: Coverage unknown until member-specific plan/PBM verification. Use checklist to capture plan answer and find supporting Epic evidence.
pathways.notes: Ask plan if covered for T2DM; verify PA, preferred GLP step therapy, A1c or diagnosis requirements, and whether CV/CKD evidence matters.

pathways.indication: Weight loss without T2DM — verify exclusion
pathways.target_values_summary: Coverage unknown until member-specific plan/PBM verification. Use checklist to capture plan answer and find supporting Epic evidence.
pathways.notes: Many plans exclude diabetes-only products for weight loss; do not assume coverage.

agents.notes: Coverage is plan/member-specific; verify with PBM/plan.

pathways.target_values_summary: Coverage unknown until member-specific plan/PBM verification. Use checklist to capture plan answer and find supporting Epic evidence.
pathways.notes: Ask if oral semaglutide is preferred/nonpreferred and whether metformin or injectable GLP trial is required.

agents.notes: Coverage is plan/member-specific; verify with PBM/plan.

pathways.target_values_summary: Coverage unknown until member-specific plan/PBM verification. Use checklist to capture plan answer and find supporting Epic evidence.
pathways.notes: Ask if covered for T2DM and whether Ozempic/Trulicity/Rybelsus or metformin step therapy is required.

pathways.indication: CKD/albuminuria with T2DM — verify if relevant
pathways.target_values_summary: Coverage unknown until member-specific plan/PBM verification. Use checklist to capture plan answer and find supporting Epic evidence.
pathways.notes: Only use if plan explicitly recognizes kidney-risk language; otherwise treat as supporting context, not coverage criterion.

agents.notes: Coverage is plan/member-specific; verify with PBM/plan.

pathways.target_values_summary: Coverage unknown until member-specific plan/PBM verification. Use checklist to capture plan answer and find supporting Epic evidence.
pathways.notes: Ask if preferred GLP-1 and whether PA/step therapy applies.

pathways.indication: T2DM with CV risk — verify if relevant
pathways.target_values_summary: Coverage unknown until member-specific plan/PBM verification. Use checklist to capture plan answer and find supporting Epic evidence.
pathways.notes: Use ASCVD only if plan asks or if PA form recognizes CV risk evidence.

agents.notes: Coverage is plan/member-specific; verify with PBM/plan.

pathways.target_values_summary: Coverage unknown until member-specific plan/PBM verification. Use checklist to capture plan answer and find supporting Epic evidence.
pathways.notes: Ask if preferred/nonpreferred and whether prior GLP or metformin evidence is required.

agents.notes: Coverage is plan/member-specific; verify with PBM/plan.

pathways.target_values_summary: Coverage unknown until member-specific plan/PBM verification. Use checklist to capture plan answer and find supporting Epic evidence.
pathways.notes: Ask if still covered/formulary and whether preferred alternatives are required.

agents.notes: Coverage is plan/member-specific; verify with PBM/plan.

pathways.target_values_summary: Coverage unknown until member-specific plan/PBM verification. Use checklist to capture plan answer and find supporting Epic evidence.
pathways.notes: Ask if still covered/formulary and whether preferred alternatives are required.

agents.notes: Coverage is plan/member-specific; verify with PBM/plan.

pathways.target_values_summary: Coverage unknown until member-specific plan/PBM verification. Use checklist to capture plan answer and find supporting Epic evidence.
pathways.notes: Ask if weight-loss drugs are a covered benefit; verify BMI, comorbidity, lifestyle duration, PA, and step therapy.

pathways.indication: Established CVD with overweight/obesity to verify
pathways.target_values_summary: Coverage unknown until member-specific plan/PBM verification. Use checklist to capture plan answer and find supporting Epic evidence.
pathways.notes: Ask if plan recognizes CV risk-reduction indication and what documentation is required.

pathways.target_values_summary: Coverage unknown until member-specific plan/PBM verification. Use checklist to capture plan answer and find supporting Epic evidence.
pathways.notes: Ask if plan recognizes MASH/MASLD/fibrosis indication; verify biopsy/noninvasive fibrosis requirements and cirrhosis exclusions.

agents.notes: Coverage is plan/member-specific; verify with PBM/plan.

pathways.target_values_summary: Coverage unknown until member-specific plan/PBM verification. Use checklist to capture plan answer and find supporting Epic evidence.
pathways.notes: Ask if weight-loss drugs are a covered benefit; verify BMI, comorbidity, lifestyle duration, PA, and step therapy.

pathways.target_values_summary: Coverage unknown until member-specific plan/PBM verification. Use checklist to capture plan answer and find supporting Epic evidence.
pathways.notes: Ask if OSA indication is covered; verify AHI/REI threshold, sleep study requirements, BMI requirement, and PAP/CPAP requirements.

agents.notes: Coverage is plan/member-specific; verify with PBM/plan.

pathways.target_values_summary: Coverage unknown until member-specific plan/PBM verification. Use checklist to capture plan answer and find supporting Epic evidence.
pathways.notes: Ask if still covered/formulary and whether preferred Wegovy/Zepbound or other alternatives are required.

pathways.indication: Weight loss without T2DM — verify exclusion
pathways.target_values_summary: Coverage unknown until member-specific plan/PBM verification. Use checklist to capture plan answer and find supporting Epic evidence.
pathways.notes: Many plans exclude diabetes-only products for weight loss; do not assume coverage.
